---
title: LLM skill usage
date: 2026-06-26
---

Tracking my claude skill usage:

Top skills overall:

┌──────┬─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┬────────┐
│ Rank │                          Skill                          │ Count  │
├──────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────┤
│ 1    │ grill-with-docs                                         │ 44     │
├──────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────┤
│ 2    │ quarto-modify                                           │ 23     │
├──────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────┤
│ 3    │ superpowers:writing-plans                               │ 20     │
├──────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────┤
│ 4    │ superpowers:subagent-driven-development                 │ 18     │
├──────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────┤
│ 5    │ superpowers:brainstorming                               │ 18     │
├──────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────┤
│ 6    │ grill-me                                                │ 14     │
├──────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────┤
│ 7    │ quarto-render                                           │ 10     │
├──────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────┤
│ 8    │ superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch              │ 10     │
├──────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────┤
│ 9    │ write-a-skill                                           │ 7      │
├──────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┼────────┤
│ 10   │ verify / obsidian-markdown / firecrawl:firecrawl-search │ 7 each │
└──────┴─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┴────────┘

By project:

*Private repo names are redacted and replaced with a brief descriptive name*

- `PRIVATE-QUARTO-WEBSITE` (129) — heaviest user; dominated by quarto-modify, grill-with-docs, superpowers:subagent-driven-development
- `PRIVATE-CLINICAL-TRIALS-RESEARCH` (43) — brainstorming, grill-with-docs, writing-plans
- `PRIVATE-ETL` (36) — grill-with-docs, writing-plans, grill-me
- obsidian-notes / vaults (22) — obsidian-markdown, write-a-skill, obsidian-bases
- Other projects: scattered, low usage

Observations:

- You lean heavily on the grilling skills (grill-with-docs + grill-me = 58) — design interrogation is a strong habit
- The superpowers planning/execution cluster accounts for ~70 invocations combined, suggesting consistent structured development workflows
- quarto-modify and quarto-render are project-specific to casebooks (all 23+10 from there)
- 22 skills only appear once, suggesting some were experimental or one-off
